fields.name: calculator_name
fields.documentation: Fully-qualified name of the NDI calculator class that produced this document, e.g., 'ndi.calc.vis.oridir_tuning' or 'ndi.calc.stimulus.tuningcurve'. The string identifies the concrete calculator implementation; see ndi.calc.* on the NDI-matlab side for the canonical class hierarchy.

fields.name: input_parameters
fields.documentation: Calculator-specific input parameters. The concrete shape is determined by the calculator named in calculator_name; the abstract calculator base does not constrain the contents.
